Privacy & Security

Your Data Deserves
Transparency

At ScaleStack Solutions, protecting your information is a priority. We believe in transparency, security, and responsible data handling — because trust is the foundation of everything we build.

Quick Summary

Privacy At A Glance

The key points, without the legal jargon. Full details below.

What We Collect

Name, email, phone, and business details from contact forms. Analytics data from website visits, and conversation data through AI tools.

How We Use Data

To respond to inquiries, deliver services, improve marketing campaigns, power AI automation, and provide better customer experiences.

How We Protect It

Secure hosting, HTTPS encryption, limited staff access, and vetted third-party providers. We never sell your data.

Your Rights

Access, correct, or request deletion of your data at any time. We'll respond promptly and fully respect your choices.

Full Policy

The Fine Print Made Clear

Click any section to expand details. Designed to be read, not just scrolled past.

Contents

Introduction What We Collect How We Use It Cookies & Analytics Advertising Tools AI Automation Third-Party Platforms Data Security Data Retention Your Rights Children's Privacy Policy Updates Contact Us

ScaleStack Solutions ("we," "our," or "us") provides website development, paid advertising management, and AI automation services. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information obtained through our services, websites, and communication tools.

By using our services or contacting us, you agree to the practices described in this policy. We encourage you to read it fully — we've made it as clear as possible.

Information you provide directly:

  • Name, email address, phone number, and business name
  • Project details, goals, and requirements
  • Messages submitted via contact forms or chatbots
  • Appointment booking details

Information collected automatically:

  • IP address and browser/device type
  • Pages visited and time spent on site
  • Referring website and search terms
  • Cookie and analytics data

Through AI tools:

  • Chatbot conversations and responses
  • Lead qualification data
  • Customer support interactions

We use the information we collect to:

  • Respond to inquiries and deliver requested services
  • Manage advertising campaigns and track performance
  • Power AI chatbots, lead management, and automation workflows
  • Send service updates and relevant communications (you may opt out)
  • Improve our website, services, and customer experience
  • Meet legal obligations and prevent fraud

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for their own marketing purposes.

We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to improve your experience and analyze website performance.

Google Analytics: Tracks visitor behaviour, traffic sources, and page performance to help us improve content and user experience.

Google Tag Manager: Manages our tracking scripts efficiently without slowing page load.

Facebook Pixel: Measures ad campaign effectiveness and enables retargeting to relevant audiences.

You can disable cookies through your browser settings. Most functionality will still be available, though some personalization features may be limited.

When managing paid advertising campaigns on behalf of clients, we access platforms including Google Ads, Facebook Ads Manager, and other ad networks. This involves:

  • Conversion tracking to measure ad performance
  • Audience building for targeted ad delivery
  • Retargeting previous website visitors
  • A/B testing ad creatives and landing pages

Data used for advertising purposes is governed by the respective platform privacy policies (Google, Meta, etc.) as well as this policy.

Our AI automation services include chatbots, lead qualification systems, appointment booking, and customer support automation. These tools may collect and process:

  • Conversation transcripts and user-submitted information
  • Appointment booking details including dates, times, and contact info
  • Customer support queries and responses
  • Lead qualification data including budget, needs, and timelines

AI-processed data is used solely to improve service delivery and is not used to train third-party AI models without consent.

We work with trusted third-party services to deliver our work. These include:

  • GoHighLevel — CRM, automation, and appointment booking
  • Google Ads & Analytics — Campaign management and traffic analysis
  • Meta Business Suite — Facebook and Instagram advertising
  • Stripe / payment processors — Secure payment handling (we never store card details)
  • Hosting providers — Secure website and data hosting

Each provider operates under their own privacy policy and security standards. We only share data necessary for service delivery.

We take data security seriously and implement reasonable industry-standard measures including:

  • HTTPS/SSL encryption on all web properties
  • Secure, access-controlled hosting environments
  • Limited staff access to personal data (need-to-know basis)
  • Regular security reviews and updates

While no system is completely secure, we work diligently to protect your data. In the event of a breach that affects your information, we will notify you as required by law.

We retain personal information only as long as necessary to deliver our services and meet legal obligations:

  • Contact inquiries — up to 2 years unless you request deletion
  • Active client records — for the duration of the service relationship
  • Analytics data — as per Google/platform retention settings (typically 14–26 months)
  • Financial records — as required by law (typically 7 years)

You can request early deletion at any time by contacting us.

Depending on your location, you may have the right to:

  • Access — Request a copy of the data we hold about you
  • Correct — Ask us to fix inaccurate information
  • Delete — Request removal of your personal data
  • Restrict — Ask us to limit how we use your data
  • Portability — Request your data in a portable format
  • Object — Opt out of certain processing activities

To exercise any of these rights, email us at privacy@scalestacksolutions.com. We'll respond within 30 days.

Our services are intended for business owners and professionals. We do not knowingly collect personal information from individuals under 18 years of age. If you believe a minor has submitted information through our services, please contact us immediately and we will delete it promptly.

We may update this policy as our services evolve or legal requirements change. When we do, we'll update the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page. For material changes, we'll notify active clients by email. Continued use of our services after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

For any privacy-related questions or requests, please contact us:

Email: privacy@scalestacksolutions.com

Website: scalestacksolutions.com/contact

We aim to respond to all privacy inquiries within 5 business days.

Security

How We Protect Your Information

Secure Hosting

All websites and data stored on enterprise-grade, access-controlled servers with regular security updates.

Encrypted Connections

SSL/TLS encryption on all web properties ensures data in transit is always protected from interception.

Limited Access Controls

Personal data is only accessible to team members who need it to deliver your services. Strictly need-to-know.

Trusted Service Providers

We only partner with vetted providers who meet high security standards and sign data processing agreements.

Your Control

You're In Control

Your rights over your data, clearly explained.

Access Data

Request a copy of everything we hold on you

Correct Info

Fix any inaccurate data we have about you

Request Deletion

Ask us to permanently erase your records

Contact Support

Reach our team for any privacy question

Our Services

How Data Supports Our Services

Each service has a specific, transparent use of data.

Website Development

Web Presence Data

Website analytics track visitor behaviour to help improve your site. Contact form submissions and customer inquiries are collected to connect you with leads.

  • Visitor analytics
  • Contact form data
  • Performance metrics
Paid Advertising

Campaign Optimization

Advertising data helps us optimize campaigns, measure ROI, and reach the right audiences. Conversion tracking shows which ads drive real results.

  • Conversion tracking
  • Audience targeting
  • Campaign performance
AI Automation

Intelligent Workflows

Chatbot conversations, lead management, appointment bookings, and customer support interactions are processed to deliver automated, personalized experiences.

  • Chatbot interactions
  • Lead qualification
  • Appointment booking
FAQ

Privacy Questions?

We collect contact details you submit (name, email, phone), website analytics, and data from AI tools like chatbots. We only collect what's necessary to deliver and improve our services.

To respond to your inquiries, deliver services, manage advertising campaigns, and power AI automation. We may also send relevant service updates — you can opt out at any time.

We never sell your data. We share it only with trusted service providers (like Google, Meta, and GoHighLevel) who help us deliver your services, and only to the extent necessary.

Yes, absolutely. Email us at privacy@scalestacksolutions.com with your request and we'll delete your personal data within 30 days, subject to any legal retention requirements.

We use SSL encryption, secure hosting, strict access controls, and trusted third-party providers. We follow industry best practices and continuously review our security measures.

Email us at privacy@scalestacksolutions.com or use the contact form on our website. We respond to all privacy inquiries within 5 business days.

Questions About Your Privacy?

We're committed to protecting your information and maintaining complete transparency. Our team is here to help with any privacy questions or concerns.
